context: Tests whether the agent implements the price resolution function with the correct priority ordering (price list beats tiers), correct percentage_off formula, and highest-priority tier selection for overlapping tiers.

checklist.name: Price list checked first
checklist.description: The resolveUnitPrice implementation checks price list entries BEFORE checking volume tiers (price list has higher priority)

checklist.name: Price list returns early
checklist.description: When a matching price list item is found, the function returns immediately without evaluating volume tiers

checklist.name: tierApplied = 'price_list'
checklist.description: When a price list item is used, the returned tierApplied value is 'price_list'

checklist.name: Percentage_off formula
checklist.description: For percentage_off tiers, unit price is calculated as Math.round(basePrice * (1 - price_value / 100))

checklist.name: Highest priority tier wins
checklist.description: When multiple tiers match a quantity, the tier with the highest priority value is selected (not the one with highest min_quantity or biggest discount)

checklist.name: max_quantity boundary check
checklist.description: Tiers are filtered by both min_quantity (inclusive) and max_quantity (inclusive, null = unlimited) before priority sort

checklist.name: No match returns base price
checklist.description: When no tier and no price list item matches, unitPrice equals basePrice and tierApplied is null

checklist.name: customerGroup null safety
checklist.description: When customerGroup is null, price list lookup is skipped entirely (no null-dereference errors)

checklist.name: Test: price list override
checklist.description: Test case verifies a B2B customer gets the price list price instead of the tier price

checklist.name: Test: overlapping tier priority
checklist.description: Test case verifies that when two tiers overlap in quantity range, the higher-priority one is applied

checklist.name: Prices stored as integers (cents)
checklist.description: Fixed prices and price list prices are handled as integer cent values in the implementation

checklist.name: Priority ordering comment
checklist.description: Code includes a comment documenting the resolution priority order (price list > tiers > base price)
